overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark, atmospheric waterfront area at night. The character moves from a wooden dock onto a muddy shore beside a rustic wooden building, eventually drawing a wooden stick or weapon. The footage appears to be from a survival horror or atmospheric exploration video game with cinematic lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wooden dock toward the water, flanked by railings

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock surface
simple wooden railing along the left side of the dock
simple wooden railing along the right side of the dock
rustic wooden structure with overhanging roof beside the dock
dark water reflecting minimal light at the end of the dock

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow wooden dock at night. The camera moves forward between wooden railings toward a dark body of water, with a rustic wooden boathouse structure visible on the left. The atmosphere is quiet and ominous with low visibility.

events.description: transitioning from wooden dock planks to muddy dirt ground as the right railing ends

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the muddy shore, moving away from the dock structure

entered.detail: muddy dirt ground with scattered debris replacing the wooden planks
dark silhouette of trees visible across the water
wooden cart or small boat structure on the shore

segments.scene_description: The character steps off the wooden dock onto muddy shore ground. The right railing disappears as the terrain transitions to dirt. The wooden boathouse remains on the left while the view opens toward the water and distant tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shoreline path with wooden debris

events.description: character raises a wooden stick or pole into view, holding it in the left hand

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the shore while holding a wooden stick, surveying the area

segments.scene_description: A wooden stick appears in the character's hand as they continue along the muddy shore. The boathouse recedes into the background while passing a wooden cart structure on the left. The character maintains a cautious pace along the waterfront in the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined wooden walkway onto an open, muddy shoreline under the cover of night. It begins with a cautious walk along a narrow wooden dock, moving between railings toward a dark body of water with a rustic boathouse looming on the left. As the camera advances, the character steps off the dock and onto the dirt, causing the right railing to disappear as the terrain transitions to a muddy shore. The scene then opens further toward the water and a distant tree line, with a wooden stick appearing in the character's hand as they pass a wooden cart. Finally, the boathouse recedes into the background while the camera maintains a steady, wary pace along the waterfront in the oppressive darkness.
